REST API for JupyterHub, the multi-user server for Jupyter notebooks. This API provides endpoints for managing users, groups, services, proxy routes, and the hub itself. JupyterHub spawns, manages, and proxies multiple instances of single-user Jupyter notebook servers.

Contact Support:
 Name: Jupyter Project
 Email: jupyter@googlegroups.com
